title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾风格为特色。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个基于智能体技能的框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作效果。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随用户成长而发展的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform
native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由代理管理的博物馆展览项目，使用 Rust 语言和 Gajae-Code / LazyCodex 构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills

summary: OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: Robust AI Security and Alignment: A Sisyphean Endeavor?
content: <p><a href="https://www.nist.gov/news-events/news/2026/06/nist-mathematical-proof-supports-transition-continuous-monitor-and-update" rel="ugc">NIST article</a> covers this paper well</p> <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/7exvix/robust_ai_security_alignment_sisyphean">Comments</a></p>
summary: 文章探讨了AI安全与对齐的挑战，引用NIST文章和社区评论，暗示其艰巨性如西西弗斯式努力。
highlights: NIST article covers this paper well
Robust AI Security and Alignment: A Sisyphean Endeavor?

title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
content: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
summary: OpenAI发布新报告，绘制了人工智能如何重塑欧盟就业的图景，重点指出哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。
highlights: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU
highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes

title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
content: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

highlights: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership
deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations

title: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
summary: DiScoFormer是一种统一的Transformer模型，能够同时处理密度估计和评分任务，并跨不同数据分布进行泛化。
highlights: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
该模型同时处理密度估计和评分任务

title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
summary: 本文介绍如何通过一条命令在Hugging Face Jobs上运行vLLM服务器，简化了部署流程，并提供了快速启动指南。
highlights: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
